name: Reverse a LL
category: Learn LinkedList [Single LL, Double LL, Medium, Hard Problems]
statement: Given the head of a singly linked list. Reverse the given linked list and return the head of the modified list.
constraints:
• 0 <= number of nodes in the Linked List <= 105
  • 0 <= ListNode.val <= 104

examples.explanation: All the links are reversed and the head now points to the last node of the original list.
All the links are reversed and the head now points to the last node of the original list. This can be seen like: 6 <- 8 <- head.
